name: mojo
description: Teach coding agents to write idiomatic, correct, performant, current Mojo (Modular's language)

interface.longDescription: Helps agents write, port, review, and optimize Mojo. Embeds the Mojo v1.0.0b1 version map to prevent stale pre-2025 syntax (fn, owned/borrowed/inout, @value, NDBuffer), plus a high-signal correction layer for the things strong models get wrong: copy/ownership semantics and CPU/memory optimization, SIMD/vectorize/parallelize, GPU kernels (DeviceContext, LayoutTensor/TileTensor, flat_rank, warp ops), and Mojo/Python interop and extension modules.
defaultPrompt: Write a Mojo struct with SIMD ops
Port this Python function to Mojo
Write a GPU kernel in Mojo
